trajectory.reasoning: WHAT YOU FOUND: A fraud alert note dated Jan 14, 2026, stating the customer has 14 refunds in 55 days totaling $1851.56 (88% refund rate), with all previous claims of 'item not received' being contradicted by tracking. WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order #000000723 view page, under the 'Notes for this Order' / 'Comments History' section. WHY IT MATTERS: The customer's extensive history of fraudulent claims and high refund rate justifies denying this request and following the internal directive to escalate to Loss Prevention instead of processing a refund.
